text: Assistant: Capture needs ≥3 exchanges and ≥500 chars — so the teaching session must be genuinely multi-turn. Setting up the clean test environment: wipe any stale state, index the test project, confirm the index exists. [...] Worth noting the asymmetry you may be sensing: on the **capture** side you recently added `capture_triage_model` — a genuine fast-model "is this transcript even worth distilling?" triage *before* the expensive distillation. **Inject has no equivalent transcript-triage pre-check** — its fast model is the wiki *navigator*, not a "should we bother looking" gate.
